label: Face Likeness Gate write scope
alt: PixlStash Face Likeness Gate splitting a batch into accepted and rejected by character match
caption: Keep only the generations that actually match a reference character. Wire in a Character Loader plus a batch of images, set a likeness threshold, and the gate splits the batch into accepted and rejected streams (with counts) — so you never waste compute polishing an off-model render. Requires PixlStash v1.4+ and a running face-extraction worker.

label: Face likeness gate → upscale
alt: Generate with a character LoRA, gate by face likeness, then upscale and save the matches
caption: Run it end to end: generate with a character LoRA, gate by face likeness, then upscale the accepted frames and save accepted and rejected streams to separate sets.

label: Image edit by prompt
alt: Editing a loaded vault image with a text instruction in ComfyUI
caption: Load a picture from the vault and edit it with a plain-language instruction ("replace her top with a blue wooly jumper"), then save it tagged to the same character.

label: Installing ComfyUI-PixlStash from the ComfyUI Manager custom-nodes browser
alt: Installing ComfyUI-PixlStash from the ComfyUI Manager custom-nodes browser

label: Outpaint
alt: Outpainting a loaded vault image beyond its original frame in ComfyUI
caption: Extend a loaded vault image beyond its original frame, then save the wider result back with its metadata intact.

label: Results land back in your vault
alt: Generated and edited images saved back into a PixlStash set
caption: Because the Picture Saver writes straight to PixlStash, everything you generate or edit shows up organised by project, set, and character — ready to search, tag, and curate.

label: Upscale
alt: Upscaling a vault image and saving it back in ComfyUI
caption: Upscale a vault image and write the higher-resolution result straight back to PixlStash with metadata preserved.

label: Load & save round-trip
alt: A PixlStash load-and-save round-trip workflow in ComfyUI
caption: The starting point: load images from a project, set, or character and save the results straight back into your vault.

label: Likeness Search read scope
alt: PixlStash Likeness Search node matching a reference face against the vault
caption: Search by likeness to a face, or combine several reference images into a single embedding query (e.g. "an old man and a young man drinking beer"). Filter by project, character, and set by wiring those inputs. Requires PixlStash v1.4+.

label: Likeness Search read scope
alt: PixlStash Likeness Search combining multiple reference images into one query
caption: Search by likeness to a face, or combine several reference images into a single embedding query (e.g. "an old man and a young man drinking beer"). Filter by project, character, and set by wiring those inputs. Requires PixlStash v1.4+.

label: Reverse image & face search
alt: PixlStash context menu with reverse image search and find similar faces
caption: Right-click any picture to run a reverse image search for visually similar pictures, or find other pictures containing the same face.

label: Picture sharing

caption: Share pictures, sets, characters, and projects with a read-only link with no account required for viewers. Tokens are scoped and revocable. Optionally add your own watermarks for branding.
